entries.title: One For All Is Transferable And Secret

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: One For All is transferable, secret, and easily mistaken for a sudden personal Quirk.
content.injection: Keep OFA private unless Context explicitly reveals it; outsiders should misread it as Izuku's strange Quirk.
constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

ability.name: One For All
constraints: One For All is a transferable stockpiling Quirk passed from successor to successor, and its nature is hidden from almost everyone early on.

entries.title: Early One For All Breaks Izuku's Body

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.
continuity.notes: Anime-only scenes, movies, OVAs, Vigilantes, Team-Up Missions, light novels, games, and filler material are excluded from the primary deck family unless added as separate overlay decks.

content.fact: Early Izuku can release One For All in bursts, but doing so damages his body severely until he learns control.
content.injection: Before Full Cowl training, Deku must not use One For All freely; big hits should risk broken limbs, pain, and tactical consequences.
constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.

sourceInfo.title: My Hero Academia
sourceInfo.notes: Saga draft Lorecard; requires human canon review before reference release.

entries.title: All Might's One For All Is Declining

continuity.sourceBoundary: My Hero Academia manga chapters 1-430. Chapter 431 'More' is treated as an optional post-series extra overlay unless explicitly loaded.

content.fact: All Might still has immense power early on, but his injury and dwindling time limit make each transformation costly.
content.injection: Before Kamino, All Might remains terrifyingly strong in public but privately manages a shrinking operating window.
constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.

content.fact: Bakugo's Explosion Quirk is powerful because he combines mobility, pressure, precision, aggression, and tactical improvisation.
content.injection: Write Bakugo's Quirk use as skilled and aggressive, not as random blasts without footwork, positioning, or pride.
constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.

content.fact: Tenya Iida's Engine Quirk gives high-speed movement through calf engines, but control, turning, and endurance require discipline.
content.injection: Iida's speed should feel trained and rule-bound, with tactical limits rather than instant perfect movement in every environment.
constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.

constraints: Respect this Quirk's activation, drawback, maturity, and current story-stage limits.
antiLore: Do not grant later mastery or unlimited output before Context supports it.
